"cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:L/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-20", "name": "Improper Input Validation"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-639", "name": "Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key"}], "description": "## Summary

Before OpenClaw 2026.4.2, remote CDP discovery could return a trailing-dot localhost host such as `localhost.` and bypass OpenClaw's loopback-host normalization. That let a non-loopback remote CDP profile pivot the follow-up connection back onto localhost.

## Impact

A hostile discovery response could retarget authenticated browser control toward a localhost-resolving endpoint on the OpenClaw host. This weakened the existing remote-CDP loopback protection and could expose localhost-backed browser state.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Affected versions: `<= 2026.4.1`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.4.2`
- Latest published npm version: `2026.4.1`

## Fix Commit(s)

- `9c22d636697336a6b22b0ae24798d8b8325d7828` — normalize localhost absolute-form CDP hosts before loopback checks

## Release Process Note

The fix is present on `main` and is staged for OpenClaw `2026.4.2`. Publish this advisory after the `2026.4.2` npm release is live.

Thanks @smaeljaish771 for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00251, "percentile": 0.16181}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fh32-73r9-rgh5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-07T18:15:56Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fh32-73r9-rgh5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fh32-73r9-rgh5"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41372"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-07T18:15:56Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-fh32-73r9-rgh5", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/9c22d636697336a6b22b0ae24798d8b8325d7828", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41372", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-loopback-protection-bypass-via-trailing-dot-localhost-in-cdp-discovery", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fh32-73r9-rgh5"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-fh32-73r9-rgh5", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Trailing-dot localhost CDP hosts could bypass remote loopback protections", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T19:03:56Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fh32-73r9-rgh5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.4.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: Trailing-dot localhost CDP hosts could bypass remote loopback protections
